# pfsense_system_tunables (Data Source)

Retrieves all system [tunables](https://docs.netgate.com/pfsense/en/latest/system/advanced-tunables.html) (sysctls). Tunables allow adjusting FreeBSD kernel parameters that control networking, memory, and other system behaviors.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "pfsense_system_tunables" "all" {}

output "tunable_names" {
  value = [for t in data.pfsense_system_tunables.all.system_tunables : t.tunable]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `system_tunables` (Attributes List) List of system tunables. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--system_tunables))

<a id="nestedatt--system_tunables"></a>
### Nested Schema for `system_tunables`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) For administrative reference (not parsed).
- `tunable` (String) Tunable name (sysctl MIB name, e.g. 'net.inet.tcp.syncookies').
- `value` (String) Value to set for the tunable. Use 'default' to reset to the system default.
